themes.reasoning_notes: Creates three 3/3 Beast tokens; token production is the card's core function despite convoke cost reduction.
Makes multiple bodies at once and convoke naturally plays well in creature-dense go-wide shells.
Convoke is a cost-reduction mechanic that lets creatures help cast this expensive spell ahead of curve.
Oracle text directly creates three 3/3 Beast tokens; token production is the card's clear deckbuilding identity.
Three bodies from one card supports wide-board strategies, though it is still primarily a token-maker rather than a dedicated anthem payoff.
It has convoke in its own cost, so creature-heavy shells cast it more efficiently, but the card is not mainly a convoke build-around.
